symptom: Users unable to login after password reset, receiving 401 Unauthorized
rootCause: JWT token expiration time not updated in cache after password change
fix: Invalidate all user sessions in Redis cache when password is reset

symptom: API Gateway returns 504 timeout for requests taking longer than 30 seconds
rootCause: Default timeout configuration too aggressive for long-running operations
fix: Increase gateway timeout to 60s and implement async processing for heavy operations

symptom: Payment transactions randomly fail with 'duplicate transaction' error
rootCause: Race condition in idempotency key generation under high concurrency
fix: Use distributed lock (Redis) before generating idempotency keys

symptom: Database queries slow down significantly during peak hours
rootCause: Missing composite index on frequently queried columns (user_id, created_at)
fix: Add composite index: CREATE INDEX idx_user_created ON orders(user_id, created_at DESC)

symptom: Cache hit rate drops to 20% causing database overload
rootCause: Cache eviction policy set to LRU with insufficient memory allocation
fix: Increase Redis memory limit and switch to LFU eviction policy for better hit rates

symptom: Background jobs stuck in pending state and never execute
rootCause: Worker processes crash silently due to unhandled promise rejections
fix: Add global error handlers and implement job retry mechanism with exponential backoff

symptom: File uploads fail intermittently with 'connection reset' error
rootCause: S3 multipart upload not properly handling network interruptions
fix: Implement resumable uploads with chunk verification and automatic retry logic

symptom: Email notifications delayed by 2-3 hours during high traffic
rootCause: Single-threaded email queue processor cannot keep up with volume
fix: Scale to multiple worker instances and implement priority-based queue processing

symptom: Search returns stale results showing deleted items
rootCause: Elasticsearch index not synchronized with database deletions
fix: Implement CDC (Change Data Capture) pipeline to sync deletions in real-time

symptom: Users can access resources they shouldn't have permissions for
rootCause: Permission checks bypass when using cached user roles after role changes
fix: Invalidate user permission cache immediately on role updates and add audit logging

symptom: Monthly reports generation times out after 5 minutes
rootCause: Report queries scan entire table without date range filters
fix: Add partition pruning on date columns and generate reports asynchronously

symptom: CSV import fails silently for files larger than 10MB
rootCause: Request body size limit set to 10MB in Express middleware
fix: Increase body-parser limit to 50MB and implement streaming CSV parser

symptom: Third-party API integration returns 429 rate limit errors
rootCause: No rate limiting or backoff strategy implemented in API client
fix: Add token bucket rate limiter and exponential backoff with jitter

symptom: Frontend dashboard shows incorrect data after page refresh
rootCause: React state not properly synchronized with server state on mount
fix: Implement proper data fetching in useEffect with dependency array

symptom: Session expires unexpectedly after 5 minutes of activity
rootCause: Sliding session window not implemented, using fixed expiration
fix: Update session TTL on each authenticated request to implement sliding window

symptom: API returns 500 error when special characters in query parameters
rootCause: URL encoding not handled properly in gateway routing logic
fix: Add proper URL decoding middleware and validate input encoding

symptom: Payment webhook events processed multiple times causing duplicate charges
rootCause: Webhook handler not idempotent, no deduplication mechanism
fix: Store processed webhook IDs in database and check before processing

symptom: Database connection pool exhausted during traffic spikes
rootCause: Connection pool size too small and connections not released properly
fix: Increase pool size to 50 and ensure all queries use try-finally to release connections

symptom: Cache stampede occurs when popular keys expire simultaneously
rootCause: All cache entries set with same TTL causing synchronized expiration
fix: Add random jitter to TTL values and implement probabilistic early expiration

symptom: Background job queue grows unbounded causing memory issues
rootCause: No max queue size limit and failed jobs not moved to dead letter queue
fix: Set max queue size to 10000 and implement DLQ for failed jobs after 3 retries
